member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Core.Model.CompletenessChannel
member.summary: Completeness channel is a provider of completeness of specified catalog

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Core.Model.CompletenessDetail
member.summary: Completeness detail is a value of completeness per feature, i.e. completeness of product properties, completeness of product prices, etc.

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Core.Model.CompletenessEntry
member.summary: Completeness entriy is a value of completeness per product

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Core.Services.ICompletenessDetailEvaluator
member.summary: ICompletenessDetailEvaluator is a base interface for all detail evaluators. Implement & register implementaton to provide your own validator for product completeness

member.name: T:VirtoCommerce.CatalogPublishingModule.Core.Services.ICompletenessEvaluator
member.summary: ICompletenessEvaluator is a base interface for all completeness evaluators. Implement & register implementation to customize evaluation process
